top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F' 
  AND e.Symptoms IS NULL 
  AND e.`aCL IgA` = 'normal';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F' 
  AND e.Symptoms IS NULL 
  AND e.`aCL IgA` = 'normal';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F' 
  AND (e.Symptoms IS NULL OR e.Symptoms = '')
  AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%anti-scl70%normal%';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F' 
  AND e.Symptoms IS NULL 
  AND e.`aCL IgA` = 'normal';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F' 
  AND (e.Symptoms IS NULL OR e.Symptoms = '')
  AND e.Diagnosis NOT LIKE '%scl70%' 
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Examination e2 
    WHERE e2.ID = p.ID 
      AND e2.Diagnosis LIKE '%scl70%' 
      AND e2.`aCL IgA` = 'normal'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F' 
  AND (e.Symptoms IS NULL OR e.Symptoms = '')
  AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%anti-scl70%normal%';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F' 
  AND e.Symptoms IS NULL 
  AND e.`aCL IgA` = 'normal';
